description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent red-tiled gable roof and a spacious, elevated terrace at the front, complete with two blue lounge chairs and a small pool. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, complemented by stone or concrete accents around the base and terrace. A detached garage with a matching red-tiled roof sits adjacent to the main building, connected by a paved driveway. The property is surrounded by a neatly landscaped yard with geometric green and black patterns, suggesting manicured lawns and garden beds. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design blends traditional bungalow elements with modern landscaping and outdoor amenities.
description: A single-story bungalow with a red-tiled gable roof, spacious terrace, pool, detached garage, and landscaped yard with geometric patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, terrace with pool and lounge chairs, and the detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Direct frontal view highlighting the terrace, pool, and symmetrical layout of the yard and driveway.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the terrace, pool area, and the expanse of the landscaped yard.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, the roof structure, and the garage's position relative to the main building.
